feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Finessed the 'do
entry.content: Finessed the 'do

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google is rolling out a new feature allowing users to change their Gmail address
entry.content: >Google allows you to change your @gmail.com username or create a new alias without losing data. Your old address automatically becomes an alias for your inbox, meaning you can keep receiving mail on both addresses and sign in to Google services with either one. Just found out about this. Did you switch to a new one?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Give me one good justification for how anything he said makes sense, other than …
entry.content: Give me one good justification for how anything he said makes sense, other than him being a total simp and cuck. What do you mean, what your woman did in the past is her business? She could have been a sadist fuck who ate sacrificed children for dinner. Many gods have done far worse, btw. Kratos was literally a victim of such sadism from gods.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: [Distressing News] Marathon reaches new low
entry.content: >On Monday morning, Bungies latest game Marathon, has reached an all new low peak of 1,889 on steam. >Sources from inside the company report that morale at the studio is at low point with many fearing for their jobs. With the recent cuts over at Bungie, devs do not feel safe with the current gloom mood, with some going so far as saying there will be a new round of layoffs. >This is all speculative but the numbers are not looking good. One must remember that Sony bought Bungie for 3.6 billion dol
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Did you know that the folding fan was invented in Japan in the 7th-8th century AD??
entry.content: It was later introduced to China, were it came into vogue and was referred to as Japanese fan.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I'm gonna tell you all the reasons why David Corenswet is a better choice for Su…
entry.content: I'm gonna tell you all the reasons why David Corenswet is a better choice for Superman over Henry Cavill. >Corenswet is American Cavill is British >Corenswet is 6'4 Cavill is 6'0 >Corenswet has the Superman curl Cavill has a receding hairline >Corenswet has a wholesome smile Cavill has a shit eating grin >Corenswet has a comic accurate costume Cavill has the worst live action Superman suit of all time >Corenswet's Supes doesn't kill Cavill's Supes does kill >Corenswet's Supes saves kids and anim
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Introverts where introverts aren't accepted
entry.content: I am not one to make posts such as this, but I am feeling particularly chuddy this day. I have been reflecting on picture and my life in general and man, it really sucks. I don't know how it is in other countries, but from my experience nerds in LATAM get the short end of the stick 10 times out 10. Being nerdy in North America seems much more 'mainstream' and socially acceptable than down here (Unless you're Chris Chan levels of insane). Furthermore, attempting to participate in anything outside
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Fake daylight
entry.content: Is there a way to fake a daylight that changes brightness and color throughout the day. I feel happier working at work next to the bigass windows, than in my basement of a room at home, and I feel like sunlight (or at least the bright 'natural' colors) would do me some good.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Long-term Linux user tries out Windows the first time in a decade
entry.content: >trackpad doesn't work during installation >wifi doesn't work, has to get drivers from the intel website like a caveman to download a zip and extract and run it >trackpad starts to work, but cant scroll >tracking and telemetry prompts >reboots required constantly >GPU drivers dont work, need to look for some exe on some websites again >sleep doesn't work >has to change some obstrus bios settings to get it working (on linux it just worked without it) >fans go crazy, spinning up and down constantl
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: she's fucking suck my dick now, My heart's pounding, and I'm so flustered right now... It's my first time, after all.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Absolutely their best album
entry.content: More consistent, more mature, more masterful, better execution. Kid A has filler, repetitive and bloated tracks, and doesn't hold up against its electronic contemporaries. Ok Computer is dated and corny. In Rainbows is carried by the first half.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Dehumidifier Technology
entry.content: Does cracking open pic related or two make any depreciable difference on humidity? They always end up filling up with water fairly quickly. I live in a 120sqft room all day. No, I am not allowed to have an air conditioner/dehumidifier.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Scissor lift in garage with low ceiling - yes or no? I'm losing my mind when I h…
entry.content: Scissor lift in garage with low ceiling - yes or no? I'm losing my mind when I have to work laying under the car, using jack stands. Would this be an improvement? I still would not be able to get under the car while standing up, but at least I could be hunched like a medieval miner?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: ugggh one of my amazon packages was for some weird reason given to UPS instead o…
entry.content: ugggh one of my amazon packages was for some weird reason given to UPS instead of my governments regular postal service so now I cannot receive my package because UPS is horrible and tries to deliver the package to me in person at 11am and then if ur not home or ready to answer the phone they take the package to the nearest UPS pick up point which is a 2 hour walk lol, regular post office would be 5 minutes walk away
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Were you aware of how seamless it is to have zfs on windows? You don't need a na…
entry.content: Were you aware of how seamless it is to have zfs on windows? You don't need a nas. You just have to connect the drive as a physical drive to hyper-v ubuntu and share with windows through samba. And then you dont ever have to think about it again because windows will save the vm then restore state every time you shutdown or restart windows.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: found a plain-text-only forum, no images no formatting, feels like the old web
entry.content: texttotalk.org — literally just .txt files being served back to you. no images, no markdown, no html, no embeds, nothing. you type text, it shows text. that's it. sign up is instant, no email required, just pick a username and a little avatar icon. no algorithm either, board's just sorted newest/top, no feed shoving stuff at you. posted a few things, nobody's said anything about it, seems pretty hands-off on the moderation side. kinda nice not scrolling past ads and gifs for once. texttotalk.org
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: An Open Letter to Swissfags
entry.content: Dear fellow Swissfags, you may believe you are cool by flaunting these tokens, this is false. You mirror a lefti displaying xis/xer pins, please refrain from displaying an entire brigade's worth of patches and do not bring your alibaba "tactical" rucksack to university. This will make you less of a fag. With warm regards, Anon.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Something I think about often.
entry.content: When I was 11, my best friend and I were having a sleepover. During it, she introduced me to a website called Omegle. I'd never heard of it before, so being a curious kid, I tried it out. At first, it was actually kind of fun. We talked to randoms, got flashed a few times (which was disgusting), and spent most of the night trolling strangers. Then everything changed. We were waiting for the next video feed to connect. For a few seconds, there was no one on screen.. there was just silence. Then I
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /mu/ Music: HARD TIMES! After 5 consecutive albums flopping due to being schizotarded drug a…
entry.content: HARD TIMES! After 5 consecutive albums flopping due to being schizotarded drug abuse slop sessions, Bjork has reluctantly resigned to being a gas station wagie to make ends meet. Instead of selling the audiorape that came in every album after Medulla, she now sells Marlboro 100's and Four Loko's. Well? What do you have to say to her?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Toti Soler
entry.content: To me, he's the Spanish equivalent of Miles Davis: reinvented the flamenco genre forever (even before Paco de Lucía would release Fuente y Caudal) and remains one of the most brilliant guitar players and composers I've ever heard.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music
